feature: Improve Type Safety and Reduce 'Any' Usage
description: Replace typing.Any and dict[str, Any] with proper TypedDict, dataclass, and Pydantic types throughout the Autoflow codebase
workflow_rationale: This is a refactoring task because we need to add new type-safe patterns alongside existing code, gradually migrate consumers to use the new types, and then remove the old Any-based patterns. The changes must preserve backward compatibility with existing JSON file formats while improving type safety.

phases.name: Create Type-Safe Data Models
phases.description: Define TypedDict and dataclass types for common data structures (tasks, review state, strategy memory, etc.) alongside existing code. This phase adds new types without changing existing behavior.

subtasks.description: Create TypedDict definitions for task data structures in autoflow/core/types.py

verification.command: python3 -c "from autoflow.core.types import TaskData, TasksFile; print('TaskData:', TaskData.__annotations__); print('TasksFile:', TasksFile.__annotations__)"

subtasks.description: Create TypedDict for review state structures in autoflow/core/types.py

verification.command: python3 -c "from autoflow.core.types import ReviewState; print('ReviewState created successfully')"

subtasks.notes: TypedDict for review state structures already exists in autoflow/core/types.py. ReviewApproval and ReviewState TypedDict classes are properly defined with all required fields. Verification passed - ReviewState imports successfully.

subtasks.description: Create TypedDict for strategy memory structures in autoflow/core/types.py

verification.command: python3 -c "from autoflow.core.types import StrategyMemory; print('StrategyMemory created successfully')"

subtasks.notes: TypedDict for strategy memory structures already exists in autoflow/core/types.py. StrategyMemory TypedDict class is properly defined with all required fields (spec_slug, updated_at, strategic_context, key_decisions, lessons_learned, retry_history, optimization_hints). Verification passed - StrategyMemory imports successfully.

subtasks.description: Create generic TypedDict for JSON data with common metadata patterns in autoflow/core/types.py

verification.command: python3 -c "from autoflow.core.types import JsonData, MetadataDict; print('Generic types created successfully')"

subtasks.notes: Enhanced generic types in autoflow/core/types.py: MetadataDict with common fields (created_at, updated_at, version, author, tags, archived), JsonData as base TypedDict, added JSONData type alias for JSON-serializable primitives, added TypeVar T for generics. All verifications passed.

phases.name: Add Type-Safe JSON Helper Functions
phases.description: Create typed versions of read_json/write_json functions that use the new TypedDict types, keeping the original functions for backward compatibility.

subtasks.description: Add typed JSON helper functions to autoflow/utils/file_helpers.py

verification.command: python3 -c "from autoflow.utils.file_helpers import load_json_typed; print('load_json_typed available')"

subtasks.notes: Added type-safe JSON helper functions to autoflow/utils/file_helpers.py. Implemented load_json_typed() and save_json_typed() functions that work with TypedDict types for better static analysis. Functions include proper type annotations using TypeVar T for generic JSON loading. Verification passed - load_json_typed is available and functional.

subtasks.description: Add typed JSON helper methods to StateManager in autoflow/core/state.py

verification.command: python3 -c "from autoflow.core.state import StateManager; print('StateManager has typed methods')"

subtasks.notes: Added read_json_typed() and write_json_typed() methods to StateManager class for type-safe JSON operations with TypedDict types. Methods provide TypeVar T for generic type support and maintain same atomic write guarantees as existing methods. Verification passed - StateManager has typed methods and they work correctly with TypedDict types.

subtasks.description: Add typed read_json function to autoflow/bmad/templates.py

verification.command: python3 -c "from autoflow.bmad.templates import read_json_typed; print('read_json_typed available')"

subtasks.notes: Added read_json_typed() function to autoflow/bmad/templates.py for type-safe JSON loading. Function uses TypeVar T for generic type support and provides better static analysis. Updated module docstring with usage example. Verification passed - read_json_typed is available and functional.

phases.name: Migrate autoflow_cli.py to Use Typed Functions
phases.description: Update load_tasks, review_state_default, strategy_memory_default, and related functions to return proper TypedDict types instead of dict[str, Any].

subtasks.description: Update load_tasks and task_lookup to use TasksFile type in autoflow/autoflow_cli.py

verification.command: python3 -c "from autoflow.autoflow_cli import AutoflowCli; import inspect; sig = inspect.signature(AutoflowCli.load_tasks); print('Return type:', sig.return_annotation if sig.return_annotation != inspect.Parameter.empty else 'untyped')"

subtasks.notes: Updated load_tasks() and task_lookup() methods in autoflow/autoflow_cli.py to use TasksFile and TaskData types. Added import of TasksFile and TaskData from autoflow.core.types. Changed load_tasks return type to TasksFile, task_lookup parameter type to TasksFile and return type to TaskData. Also updated save_tasks parameter type to TasksFile. Verification passed - all type annotations are correct.

subtasks.description: Update review_state_default and sync_review_state to use ReviewState type in autoflow/autoflow_cli.py

verification.command: python3 -c "from autoflow.autoflow_cli import AutoflowCli; import inspect; sig = inspect.signature(AutoflowCli.review_state_default); print('Return type:', sig.return_annotation if sig.return_annotation != inspect.Parameter.empty else 'untyped')"

subtasks.notes: Updated review_state_default(), sync_review_state(), load_review_state(), and save_review_state() methods in autoflow/autoflow_cli.py to use ReviewState type. Also updated ReviewState TypedDict in autoflow/core/types.py to match actual usage with fields: valid, invalidated_at, invalidated_reason, spec_hash, feedback, feedback_count, spec_changed, task_approvals. All type annotations verified - methods now return ReviewState instead of dict[str, Any].

subtasks.description: Update strategy_memory_default to use StrategyMemory type in autoflow/autoflow_cli.py

verification.command: python3 -c "from autoflow.autoflow_cli import AutoflowCli; import inspect; sig = inspect.signature(AutoflowCli.strategy_memory_default); print('Return type:', sig.return_annotation if sig.return_annotation != inspect.Parameter.empty else 'untyped')"

subtasks.notes: Updated StrategyMemory TypedDict in autoflow/core/types.py to match actual usage with fields: reflections, playbook, counters, stats, updated_at. Added supporting types StrategyMemoryCounters and StrategyMemoryStats. Updated AutoflowCLI methods: strategy_memory_default() returns StrategyMemory, load_strategy_memory() returns StrategyMemory, save_strategy_memory() accepts StrategyMemory parameter. Imported StrategyMemory from autoflow.core.types. Verification passed - method returns proper StrategyMemory type instead of dict[str, Any].

phases.name: Add Type Safety to Collaboration Module
phases.description: Replace dict[str, Any] with proper types in collaboration models and activity tracking, using TypedDict for metadata fields.

subtasks.description: Create TypedDict for collaboration metadata in autoflow/collaboration/types.py

verification.command: python3 -c "from autoflow.collaboration.types import ActivityMetadata, NotificationMetadata; print('Collaboration types created')"

subtasks.description: Update collaboration/models.py to use typed metadata instead of dict[str, Any]

verification.command: python3 -c "from autoflow.collaboration.models import User; print('User model metadata type:', User.model_fields['metadata'].annotation if hasattr(User.model_fields['metadata'], 'annotation') else 'unknown')"

subtasks.description: Update collaboration/activity.py to use typed metadata in activity tracking functions

verification.command: mypy autoflow/collaboration/activity.py --no-error-summary 2>&1 | grep -c 'dict\[str, Any\]' || echo '0'

phases.name: Add Type Safety to Core Modules
phases.description: Replace dict[str, Any] with proper types in core configuration, dependency, and repository modules.

subtasks.description: Update core/config.py to use TypedDict for configuration structures

verification.command: mypy autoflow/core/config.py --no-error-summary 2>&1 | grep -c 'dict\[str, Any\]' || echo '0'

subtasks.description: Update core/dependency.py to use TypedDict for dependency metadata

verification.command: mypy autoflow/core/dependency.py --no-error-summary 2>&1 | grep -c 'dict\[str, Any\]' || echo '0'

subtasks.description: Update core/repository.py RepositoryDependency to use typed metadata

verification.command: python3 -c "from autoflow.core.repository import RepositoryDependency; print('Metadata field:', RepositoryDependency.model_fields['metadata'])"

phases.name: Type Checking and Verification
phases.description: Run mypy type checking across the entire codebase and fix any remaining type issues. Verify that all tests still pass and that JSON serialization still works correctly.

subtasks.description: Run mypy type checking on autoflow package and document remaining issues

verification.command: mypy autoflow/ 2>&1 | tee .auto-claude/specs/108-improve-type-safety-and-reduce-any-usage/mypy_report.txt | tail -20
verification.expected: Success: no issues found in X source files

subtasks.description: Run full test suite to verify type changes don't break functionality

verification.command: pytest tests/ -v --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -30

subtasks.description: Verify JSON serialization compatibility for all changed types

verification.command: python3 .auto-claude/specs/108-improve-type-safety-and-reduce-any-usage/serialization_test.py

phases.name: Cleanup and Documentation
phases.description: Update type hints documentation, add migration guide for contributors, and mark any remaining Any usage with TODO comments for future refactoring.

subtasks.description: Add type safety documentation to CLAUDE.md or README

verification.instructions: Review CLAUDE.md to ensure type safety guidelines are documented

subtasks.description: Count remaining Any usage and document in summary report

verification.command: grep -r ': Any\|dict\[str, Any\]' autoflow --include='*.py' | wc -l
verification.expected: Number should be significantly lower than initial 55+

parallel_groups.reason: Both depend only on phase-1 and modify different subsystems

summary.startup_command: echo 'Refactoring task - run subtasks in order using the implementation plan'

acceptance_criteria: mypy type checking passes with no errors
JSON serialization works correctly for all typed structures
Functions mentioned in spec (load_tasks, review_state_default, strategy_memory_default) return proper types
Reduced count of 'Any' usage in codebase

verification_steps.name: Type Checking with mypy
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Success: no issues found in source files

verification_strategy.reasoning: Medium risk refactoring that touches core data structures. Requires type checking and testing to ensure no functionality is broken.
